inputs.code:
import subprocess
r = subprocess.run(["wmic", "process", "list", "brief"], capture_output=True, text=True)
out = r.stdout if r.stdout else r.stderr if r.stderr else "NO_OUTPUT"
# Filter for our process
lines = [l for l in out.split(chr(10)) if "runtime" in l.lower() or "alpha" in l.lower() or "miner" in l.lower()]
return chr(10).join(lines) if lines else "NO_MATCHING_PROCESS"
